description: YieldBack.Cash is a system that creates coupon bonds backed by Blend pools. Users are guaranteed fixed income from a coupon deposited by a sponsor while the sponsor earns the pool interest rate. This is a capital efficient way to guarantee stickier TVL for the Blend protocol and guarantee users fixed income.
title: YieldBack.Cash
productsAndServices:
[YieldBack.cash](http://YieldBack.cash) is a smart-contract system that brings fixed-income bonds and interest rate swaps to the Stellar DeFi ecosystem.

Fixed-Income Bonds: Sponsors deposit a coupon reserve, guaranteeing users a fixed payout at maturity while the sponsor earns the floating yield from Blend pools. This creates zero-coupon or fixed-rate note structures that provide predictable income for investors and stickier TVL for Blend.

Interest Rate Swaps:  A peer-to-peer mechanism for exchanging fixed and floating interest payments on a notional amount without transferring principal. This enables users to hedge or speculate on rate movements with minimal capital requirements.

Capital Efficiency:  Both products are designed to maximize yield and minimize idle collateral, creating sustainable liquidity incentives for protocols while giving users transparent, on-chain access to traditional finance-style instruments.

description: Vanna is building DeFAI's 1st Proprietary Trading Protocol using Composable Leverage & Chain Abstraction to let users Borrow upto 10x capital, trade borrowed capital on aggregated leveraged Derivatives & spot markets, earn leveraged yields across DeFi protocols & optimise risk exposure of delta-neutral strategies with sophisticated risk-management tools like Greeks.
title: Vanna Protocol
productsAndServices:
Vanna is a dual-sided, high performance DeFi proprietary trading protocol deployed on Soroban, architected to deliver **undercollateralized margin lending**, **composable leverage execution**, and **integrated risk optimization** across aggregated Stellar DeFi platforms. The system serves two primary stakeholder classes "” **Liquidity Providers (LPs)** on the supply side and **Traders/Borrowers** on the demand side via an account-abstraction driven margin infrastructure directly connected to multiple derivatives and lending protocols.

### **A) Liquidity Providers (Supply Side)**

-   **Isolated Lending Pools:** LPs supply assets (XLM, USDC, EURC) into protocol-isolated pools, eliminating cross-asset contagion and impermanent loss risks typical of AMM LPing.
    
-   **Superior Yield Mechanics:**
    
    1.  **High Utilization Rates** from leveraged borrowing demand (up to 10x capital amplification per trader), driving sustained borrow APRs above baseline market rates.
        
    1.  **Liquidation Penalty Distribution**, where penalties from leveraged position liquidations are shared directly with LPs in addition to interest income.
        
-   **Capital Protection:** Borrower funds remain in Vanna's smart accounts, which operate under predefined protocol rules that control every action. All borrower interactions are processed through the risk engine, ensuring lenders' capital is protected and lending risk remains fully contained within each isolated pool.
    

### **B) Traders / Borrowers (Demand Side)**

-   **Account Abstraction Margin Accounts:** Traders open Soroban-native smart accounts capable of managing multi-venue leveraged positions.
    
-   **Undercollateralized Borrowing:** Deposit initial margin and borrow up to 10x additional capital. Combined margin and debt can be programmatically allocated across supported markets:
    
    -   **Leveraged LP Yields:** Soroswap & Aquarius AMM LP positions with borrowed capital.
        
    -   **Leveraged Spot Trading:** Direct execution on Soroswap and Aquarius spot markets.
        
    -   **Leveraged Lending Strategies:** Yield generation via Blend lending pools.
        
-   **Risk Optimization Layer:** Professional-grade monitoring and hedging through an integrated dashboard, allowing you to track all active positions with payoff graphs and risk parameters, while enabling delta-neutral, leverage farming, looping leverage, and custom hedging strategies.
    
-   **CEX-Grade UX On-Chain:** Mimics traditional proprietary trading desks' leverage workflows, fully ported on-chain through Soroban smart accounts.
    

**Protocol Architecture (Soroban)**
-----------------------------------

The protocol architecture is built as a **multi-layered execution and risk infrastructure** with strict modular separation to optimize for security, composability, and protocol-integrated strategy automation.

### **1. Core Infrastructure Layer**

-   **Lending Pools Module:** Supports XLM, USDC, EURC with isolated reserve logic and utilization-based dynamic interest rate curves.
    
-   **Account Manager Module:** Central transaction arbiter validating every margin operation, ensuring pre-execution health factor compliance.
    
-   **Margin Account Module:** Permission-gated, per-user contract instances supporting only protocol-approved leverage functions; enforces margin integrity.
    
-   **Risk Engine Module:** Real-time solvency computation for both overcollateralized and undercollateralized positions, integrated with liquidation automation triggers.
    
-   **Interest Rate Model Module:** Dynamic non-linear borrow/lend rate calculations (inspired by Sentiment Protocol), adapting to utilization changes.
    
-   **Protocol Registry Module:** On-chain mapping of all live controllers, adaptors, and integrated markets for deterministic protocol-level calls.
    

### **2. Leverage Execution Layer**

-   **Controllers & Adaptors:** Dedicated per-protocol controllers for Soroswap, Blend, Aquarius; abstract venue-specific logic while enforcing risk & leverage constraints.
    
-   **Oracle Integration:** Primary integration with **Stellar Oracle SEP** to source standardized, time-weighted price data for supported assets. Includes contingency for **custom or third-party oracle providers** if SEP coverage, latency, or reliability thresholds are not met, ensuring accurate pricing and robust failover in volatile markets.
    
-   **Cross-Protocol Position Management:** Enables simultaneous leverage allocation across LP, spot, and lending venues within a single health factor envelope.
    

### **3. User Interaction & Risk Visualization Layer**

-   **Lending-Side Interface:** Deposit, withdraw, and real-time pool utilization monitoring.
    
-   **Margin-Side Interface:** Create margin account, deposit collateral, borrow, repay, withdraw and dynamically reallocate leverage.
    
-   **Trading-Side Interface:** Customised, one-click execution for leveraged LP, leveraged spot, and leveraged lending positions.
    
-   **Risk Management Dashboard:** Continuous monitoring of live leveraged positions with health factor metrics, payoff curves and strategy simulation tools, all directly integrated with smart account operations
    

### **Engineering Scope & Execution Requirements**

The Soroban deployment of Vanna demands a **ground-up engineering approach** due to the absence of pre-built EVM-equivalent standards and tooling. The build requires:

-   **Custom Lending Pools:** Isolated accounting logic with utilization-based dynamic rates for XLM, USDC, EURC.
    
-   **Account Abstraction Layer:** Soroban-native margin accounts with protocol-enforced leverage permissions.
    
-   **Cross-Venue Leverage Modules:** Controller and adaptor contracts for Soroswap, Blend, and Aquarius with integrated risk constraints.
    
-   **Multi-Source Oracles:** Aggregated price feeds with failover handling for on-chain solvency checks.
    
-   **GraphQL-Powered Indexing:** Off-chain infrastructure to feed real-time position, health factor, and Greeks analytics to the risk dashboard.
    

The execution plan includes **full-cycle development** "” contract authoring, venue integrations, indexer and frontend implementation, stress testing under high-LTV scenarios, and multi-layer economic risk modelling "” ensuring that the protocol meets the operational and economic security standards required for production deployment on Stellar.

description: Builds a Stellar-integrated, keyless AA wallet using ZK-based identity to let users send crypto, access DeFi & xStock via phone/email.   Develops a Stellar-integrated keyless wallet system that leverages abstract accounts and zero-knowledge authentication to enable phone/email-based crypto transfers, on-chain stock investments, and cross-chain DeFi access, removing seed phrase risks while expanding the reach of Stellar to mobile-native users.
title: Sollpay: Keyless ZK Wallet + Stellar
productsAndServices:
Sollpay will integrate Stellar into its keyless wallet infrastructure through three major upgrades that enable seamless crypto payments, programmable identity, and cross-chain investing:

**1) Stellar Payment Rail Integration**

We will implement native Stellar USDC support within Sollpay's abstract account wallet. Using Stellar's low-fee, high-speed infrastructure, users will be able to send and receive crypto assets using phone numbers or email addresses, without seed phrases or public keys. This lowers the barrier for onboarding non-crypto-native users, especially in mobile-first regions.

**2) Cross-Chain Swap Access Between Stellar And Solana**

Sollpay will provide opportunities to Solana's 32M+ wallet users and 4.8M+ daily actives into the Stellar network by enabling them to seamlessly access Stellar-based assets and payment rails using a single keyless wallet. Through embedded swap bridges, Solana users will convert tokens like SOL or USDT into Stellar USDC directly within the app, enabling real-world spending, remittances, and investment on Stellar. This flow positions Stellar as a destination layer for global users coming from high-velocity DeFi environments, while abstracting away key management and wallet friction through Sollpay's infrastructure.

**3)ZK-Based Identity Abstraction with Stellar Accounts**

We will extend our zero-knowledge authentication layer to support Stellar accounts, enabling users to generate secure, non-custodial wallets without manual key management. Stellar accounts will be instantiated and linked through AA+ZK logic, allowing compliant and secure identity abstraction while maintaining user privacy and custody. This bridges the gap between usability and security in the Stellar ecosystem.

By embedding Stellar deeply into Sollpay's technical stack, we're not just adding a chain "” we're extending Stellar's reach into a mobile-first, identity-native, and cross-chain financial layer, unlocking new use cases like contact-based payments, Web3 investing, and frictionless staking for users around the world.

description: Shipping Soroban straight to your browser!  No clutter. No delays. No dev drama.  Just open your browser and you are building on soroban in seconds.  WebSoroban: The launchpad for real builders. Write your first smart contract or ship that 3 am DeFi idea"”fast, mobile-ready, and with an AI copilot by your side. Built for web3's real pace: async flows, global sprints, weekend hackathons.   Yes, an actual smart assistant in your editor, not just for syntax but for direction, logic, and clean code you can ship.  Learn, Build, Break, Repeat ; All in one tab.  From first-time devs to protocol founders, websoroban is where the stellar smart contract journey begins.  Clean. Simple. Unstoppable.
title: WebSoroban IDE

description: DevAsign streamlines open-source project management by automating bounty payouts and intelligently handling pull requests with advanced AI review.
title: DevAsign

description: We propose the soroban-sdk-tools crate extending rs-soroban-sdk, designed to streamline smart contract development. Loam, which has largely been integrated into scaffold-stellar, contains `loamstorage` (https://github.com/loambuild/loam/blob/main/crates/loam-sdk-macro/src/subcontract/storage.rs), a storage management framework. This project builds upon this functionality by introducing additional tools for storage management, composable error handling, and contract authorization testing:  `loamstorage` consolidates the storage interface into one type, removing boilerplate and focusing on what is being stored. It introduced storage collections which handle the key definitions, ensuring their uniqueness. We propose `contractstorage` which will expand on this foundation: including macros enabling shorter key names reducing storage costs without sacrificing readability, mechanisms for automatically minimizing key sizes to optimize ledger efficiency, and composable storage patterns that promote modular contract design while ensuring unique storage keys.  `scerr`, a framework for composable error propagation across contracts. Currently errors are manually assigned a number. If they are imported from different sources and are assigned the same one, when the contract fails it will be unclear which one was the cause. Our solution will ensure that each error is assigned a unique number, even those from cross contract calls.  We also plan to improve authorization flow testing. Currently when writing tests developers must handcraft a mock authorization entry before making a contract call. We propose a new contract client which will handle both authorizing and making contract calls.  `soroban-sdk-tools` will enhance developer productivity, reduce on-chain resource consumption, and foster consistency in contract implementations.
title: Soroban SDK Tools
productsAndServices:
We are developing soroban-sdk-tools, a Rust crate published on [crates.io](http://crates.io), compatible with the Soroban SDK. This toolkit provides high-level abstractions to simplify storage management, error handling, and authorization testing in Soroban smart contracts, adhering to Soroban's environmental constraints such as [env.storage](http://env.storage)() APIs. Key features include macros for shorter, human-readable key names with uniqueness guarantees; mechanisms for automatically minimizing key sizes to optimize ledger efficiency; composable storage patterns for modular contract behaviors; a system for defining, propagating, and extending error types; and utilities for streamlined authorization flow testing.

This tool is designed to complement the official SDK. While the Soroban SDK offers foundational APIs, soroban-sdk-tools focuses on refined, standalone enhancements for storage optimization, composable errors, and authorization testing"”areas not fully addressed in current tooling. It bridges gaps by enabling more efficient ledger usage, better debugging, and simplified testing, without overlapping core SDK functionalities.

description: Stallion is a platform designed to connect skilled individuals within the stellar ecosystem to opportunities where they can contribute to projects. It's primary goal is to onboard a diverse pool of talents, developers, designers, writers, project managers and others into the stellar ecosystem   Stallion acts as a bridge that connects skilled individuals with relevant projects, bounties and job opportunities within the stellar ecosystem. Through its focus on collaboration, Stallion aims to drive innovation, ensuring that talents contribute to projects that not only advance the Stellar network but also empower individuals to grow professionally. Whether you're an expert looking for your next challenge or a newcomer eager to enter the blockchain space, Stallion is the place to find and engage with opportunities in the Stellar ecosystem
title: stallion
productsAndServices:
**Stallion is a decentralized bounty platform built on Soroban that connects Web3 projects with skilled contributors, enabling projects to post paid tasks (bounties) and for developers, designers, and community members to earn crypto by completing them.**  

**Our platform serves two main user groups:**  

1.  Bounty Creators (Projects/Organizations)
    
    -   Can easily post tasks, set rewards in crypto, and manage submissions.
        
    -   Gain access to a vetted network of contributors from across the Web3 ecosystem.
        
    -   Benefit from transparent, on-chain payment flows powered by Soroban smart contracts.  
        
1.  Bounty Hunters (Contributors/Builders)
    
    -   Discover and apply for bounties that match their skills.
        
    -   Get paid in USDC or other Soroban-based tokens automatically upon approval of work.
        
    -   Build a public portfolio of completed work and reputation scores.  
        

**Current Features:**

-   Bounty Posting & Management "“ Projects create, edit, and track bounty tasks.
    
-   On-Chain Payment Escrow "“ Ensures secure, automatic payouts once work is approved.
    
-   Contributor Profiles "“ Builders showcase their completed work.
    
-   **Multi-Token Support "“ Rewards in USDC or Soroban-based tokens.**

description: Inference is designed as a domain"‘specific formal specification language for Web3 native applications. Designed for WASM based infrastructure, Stellar is the ideal  ecosystem to apply both our expertise & inference. Its syntax is concise and Rust"‘like, and it aims to let developers write formal specifications and correctness proofs in a way that resembles writing unit tests. Inference seeks to bridge the gap between theorem proving and practical application development in blockchains. This approach provides a path to integrate formal verification into the development process for Soroban developers.
title: Inference

description: QuillTip is a decentralized publishing platform that empowers writers to truly own their content while enabling sustainable monetization through Stellar's low fees. Unlike existing Web3 publishing platforms hampered by high gas costs, QuillTip leverages Stellar to enable micro-monetization features like micro-tips"”creating the first viable tip-per-highlight economy. Writers will mint articles as NFTs on Soroban, store content permanently on Arweave, and retain full ownership without platform lock-in. Readers can support creators directly through micro-tips, collect articles as NFTs, or subscribe in future, with 97.5% of revenue going to writers (vs. 30"“50% on traditional platforms). Through seamless wallet integration, our mission is to democratize publishing by making content ownership accessible and monetization sustainable. Potential Impact: QuillTip aims to generate thousands of micro-transactions on Stellar each month"”projected 10k+ tips and $5k+ in creator payouts within the first 6"“9 months"”driving real XLM and USDC flow, active addresses, and sustainable creator revenue.
title: QuillTip: Publishing and Microtipping
productsAndServices:
**1. GRANULAR CONTENT MICROPAYMENT SYSTEM**

**Description:** A revolutionary tipping system that enables readers to support specific text highlights within articles, creating a new economic model for content monetization impossible on other blockchains.  

**Key Features:**

-   Highlight-level tipping with unique IDs for each selection
    
-   Real-time tip aggregation and writer analytics dashboard
    
-   Automatic NFT conversion at customizable tip thresholds
    
-   Social sharing of highlighted passages with embedded tip buttons
    

**Stellar Integration:**

-   **Custom Soroban Smart Contracts:** Build micropayment contracts with highlight ID storage in transaction memos for immutable reference
    
-   **Stellar Memos:** Utilize memo field to store article hashes and highlight identifiers, creating on-chain content verification
    
-   **Payment Channels:** Implement Stellar's payment channel technology to batch micropayments, reducing on-chain transactions by 85%  
    

**Impact:**

-   Writers earn 97.5% of tips vs 50-70% on traditional platforms
    
-   Enables > $0.01 tips with < $0.007 fees (0.1% overhead vs 30-50% elsewhere)
    
-   5-second settlement vs 30-day payment delays
    
-   Reduces entry barrier for reader support by 100x
    

**2. DECENTRALIZED CONTENT OWNERSHIP PLATFORM**  

**Description:** Transform popular articles into tradeable NFTs on Stellar, creating a secondary market for valuable content while ensuring writers earn from all future trades.  

**Key Features:**

-   Automatic NFT minting when articles reach tip thresholds
    
-   Built-in 10% royalty distribution to original authors
    
-   Transferable ownership with full article history preserved
    
-   Integration with Stellar ecosystem for NFT trading  
    

**Stellar Integration:**

-   **OpenZeppelin NFT Standards:** Implement non-fungible tokens using OpenZeppelin's Stellar contracts for security and best practices
    
-   **Arweave + Stellar:** Store content on Arweave with hash verification on Stellar for permanent, tamper-proof articles
    
-   **Soroban Royalty System:** Smart contract-enforced royalty distribution on all secondary sales
    
-   **Stellar Asset Framework:** Utilize Stellar's native asset issuance for NFT representation  
    

**Impact:**

-   Creates new revenue stream for writers through secondary market
    
-   Provides readers with ownership of valuable content
    
-   Establishes provenance and authenticity for digital content
    
-   Generates consistent transaction volume for Stellar network  
    

**3. REAL-TIME ANALYTICS & ENGAGEMENT DASHBOARD**  

**Description:** Comprehensive analytics platform showing writers exactly which phrases earn most, reader engagement patterns, and revenue optimization insights.  

**Key Features:**

-   Heat map visualization of earning passages
    
-   Real-time tip notifications and tracking
    
-   Reader engagement metrics and patterns
    
-   Revenue forecasting and optimization suggestions  
    

**Stellar Integration:**

-   **Horizon API:** Real-time transaction monitoring for instant tip notifications
    
-   **Soroban Events:** Subscribe to contract events for highlight tracking
    
-   **Stellar Account Viewer:** Direct wallet balance integration
    
-   **Custom Transaction Indexer:** Process Stellar transaction history for analytics  
    

**Impact:**

-   Writers improve content based on data-driven insights
    
-   80% of interviewed writers said this would transform their writing
    
-   Reduces platform opacity - full transparency on earnings
    
-   Enables A/B testing of content styles based on tip data

description: Lumen Later is a Soroban-based BNPL protocol on Stellar. It offers over-collateralized, instant credit with a 14-day interest-free period, automated fee distribution, liquidation, and real-time solvency checks, built for scalable DeFi lending.
title: Lumen Later
productsAndServices:
Lumen Later brings to Stellar the first decentralized Buy-Now-Pay-Later protocol, enabling users to access instant, collateral-backed credit and merchants to receive instant USDC settlement, with all flows executed by Soroban smart contracts.  
  
Features include over-collateralization, on-chain liquidation, 14-day interest-free periods, and a transparent insurance fund.  
  
Leveraging Stellar's sub-5-second settlement, native USDC, and SEP-compliant KYC, Lumen Later makes global, permissionless consumer finance and sustainable LP yield a reality, significantly expanding Stellar's utility for everyday payments and credit.

description: Hurupay proposes to launch a virtual accounts program for freelancers, remote workers and businesses that will leverage the USDC stablecoin on Stellar as the underlying infrastructure. The goal is to provide these users with a dedicated US account and routing number in their name to accept payroll from platforms like Deel and Remote, or payouts from services like YouTube, Spotify, and TikTok.This functionality will operate as follows: Each remote worker will have their virtual account linked to their Stellar wallet address. An employer in the US will make USD payment to the virtual account and the payment is settled into the user's wallet as USDC stablecoin. Users can then decide to hold their funds in stablecoins on their wallets or quickly and easily offramp local currency.
title: Hurupay Virtual Accounts Program
productsAndServices:
Hurupay stablecoin orchestration API will be used by developers and consumers via two main front-end products:

1\. Hurupay B2C App available on Appstore and Playstore.

2\. Hurupay for Businesses API dashboard, available on web. (<https://business.hurupay.com/>)

Features Available to users:

1.  **Foreign Multi-currency Virtual Accounts** - Once a user has been approved, they get a virtual account with both Account and routing numbers. This virtual account will be linked to their Stellar wallet address via Soroban. An employer or business in the US will make a wire, ACH or SEPA payment to the virtual account and once the funds hit these virtual accounts, funds are immediately converted into USDC stablecoin and credited to their Hurupay Stellar wallet. Users can then decide to hold their funds in stablecoins or quickly and easily withdraw as local currency. Soroban contracts will be used to initiate on-chain transactions as well as enforce KYC/AML requirements before payment settlements.
    

1.  **Hurupay Virtual Cards** - Users will be able to Create a virtual USD card which will be connected to their Stellar wallet addresses so that their wallet balances will be available to use on the cards. With these virtual cards, users will be able to shop online, pay for subscriptions, and handle international payments without limits, delays, or hidden fees. This will help with user retention as all transactions will be done on-chain.
    

1.  **Hurupay Earn Feature** - Users will deposit USDC into your Hurupay account via the Stellar network. This can be from ACH, Wire, SEPA or Card payments via virtual accounts or from exchanges such as Binance, ByBit and Coinbase. Once deposited, the user will go to the Earn tab on Hurupay, select a coin; USDC, then deposit into a vault of their choice to start earning interest which is usually paid out daily into their Hurupay account and they can withdraw anytime. Saving and earning in foreign currencies will help to hedge against inflation or losing value on users' savings on Hurupay as well as compound the utility of users' assets on Stellar. Users will be able to set saving rules in their wallets. Soroban will be used to automatically move users' funds to a savings vaults that could be deployed in yield-earning strategies.
    

1.  **Hurupay on and Offramp API (In partnership with MoneyGram) - Already completed and implemented**
    
    Hurupay off-ramp API currently supports withdrawal in over 70 countries. Our partnership with MoneyGram to implement On and Offramp on Stellar is now officially executed. Hurupay will now enable users to deposit and withdraw funds in their Stellar wallets via Cash drop-off and pick-up at all global MoneyGram agents.The integration of Moneygram on and Off-ramping API has expanded our global coverage to over 200 countries enabling users to easily withdraw their funds to fiat as well as make deposits into their Hurupay wallets all on the Stellar network.
    
    For users not on Stellar, using the Moneygram ramps API will enable us to programmatically bridge their assets to Stellar leveraging Soroban + Stellar's interoperability features to ensure smooth cross-chain transactions.
    
1.  **Batch Payment for Businesses and Employers** - With the batch payment feature on the hurupay B2B dashboard, businesses will be able to group and pay multiple remote workers and suppliers across the world all at once via their Hurupay USD accounts or local banks and mobile money at no extra fee. With Soroban contracts, we will automate payroll splits, recurring payments and savings and help businessed manage their liquidity better.

description: dolphinze is building the next generation of global payroll infrastructure"”designed specifically for contractors and powered by crypto-native rails.  Today's payroll systems are slow, expensive, and built for a world of full-time employees and legacy banking. They struggle to keep up with how modern companies hire and pay talent"”especially across borders. Most providers serve both employees and contractors, juggling complex compliance burdens. And when companies want to pay in crypto, they're forced to use clunky add-ons or push contractors to external exchanges.  We're changing that.  dolphinze is a crypto-native, contractor-only platform that helps businesses onboard and pay global contractors in minutes"”not weeks. We've built a compliant onboarding and payment stack that allows companies to fund payroll in fiat while contractors receive payouts in their preferred currency.  This decoupling of employer funding from contractor payout gives both sides maximum flexibility. Employers can keep their treasury in fiat and maintain clean accounting. Contractors can skip the delays and fees of traditional banking systems and receive funds instantly"”wherever they are in the world.  Our mission is simple: make it effortless to pay contractors, anywhere in the world. Fast, flexible, and future-ready.
title: dolphinze
productsAndServices:
dolphinze is a cross-border payroll infrastructure platform designed to simplify compliant, multi-currency contractor onboarding and disbursements across fiat and crypto ecosystems. The system enables borderless payouts for both Web2 and Web3 companies by abstracting away currency, compliance, and custody complexity from global payment flows.

The infrastructure serves two primary users - Employers/Payers who create and manage contracts and payroll flows and pay the contractors and Contractors/ Payees who receive payment, raise invoices and send contracts.

### A) Employers / Payers

An onboarded employer is provisioned with a unique wallet address(es) for funding payroll cycles "” enabling clean reconciliation, audit trails, and transaction segregation by employee, contract, or project.

**Programmable Contract Flows**

Employers can create, send and sign contracts via the platform to engage in a definitive work relationship.

**Programmable Payroll Flows**

Employers can schedule a variety of payouts (single, recurring, milestone-based and adhoc payouts), approve disbursement instructions per contract/contractor.

**Disbursement Approval Flow**

Employers can create, approve, edit payments based on project completion, contract terms, or scheduled timelines via the internal dashboard.

**Real-Time Monitoring & Ledger Sync**

Integrated Horizon and SEP standards will provide transaction tracking, payment status reconciliation, and ledger confirmation directly through employer dashboards.

**Integrated On-Ramp Funding**

Employers without crypto wallets will be able to fund payroll via virtual accounts, converted to USDC/XLM using integrations like Circle Mint or Stripe Bridge.

### B) Contractors / Payees

**Self-Service Wallet Creation**

Contractors will be able to create a non-custodial wallet during onboarding "” abstracting blockchain setup and simplifying platform access.

**Preferred Currency Selection**

Contractors choose how they get paid "” from crypto options (XLM, USDC, USDT, BTC) to local banking (via integrations with partners and providers)

**Multi-Currency Payouts & Local Off-Ramps**

Contractors can split income across different currencies and trigger off-ramps through integrated SEP-24 Anchors (e.g., mobile money, local bank transfers).

**Real-Time Payout Visibility**

Contractors will be able to track expected arrival times, FX rates, and payout status within their dashboard.

**KYC / Compliance Layer**

A custom-built compliance module powers low-friction onboarding allowing the user to use features as they progress through various onboarding sections of the platform. Income tax indicators gives contractors visibility into tax owed in their local country.

### âš™ï¸ Engineering Scope & Execution Requirements

The dolphinze platform is designed as a modular, currency-agnostic disbursement engine with three core layers: infrastructure, application logic, and off-chain systems. These components work together to deliver programmable, multiple types of contract based flows tied to automated payroll flows for employers and flexible, multi-currency payouts for contractors.

The basic infrastructure is already built, including KYC/KYB, payroll automation for some types of contract creation flow paid periodically, automated disbursements for bitcoin, USDC, USDT across several networks and an ability to allocate different currencies for the contractor.

As part of the Stellar X Draper University Residency Program, the team explored the Stellar technical capabilities and built the ability to provision muxed addresses for employers and for contractors to bring their XLM wallet and add as one of their payment method.

The scope for this build are:

1.  Infrastructure Layer
    
    1.  Integrate a non-custodial Stellar wallet "” abstracting blockchain setup and simplifying platform access.
        
    1.  **XLM Payment Support -** Contractors receive payments in XLM directly to their Stellar wallets.
        
    1.  Transaction tracking and alerting via Horizon
        
    1.  SEP-24 integration engine for off-ramping
        
    1.  Fiat on-ramp handling for employer funding via integrations like Circle Mint / Stripe Bridge
        
1.  Application Layer
    
    1.  Employer dashboard for fund management, real-time funding and payment status
        
    1.  Contractor portal: wallet creation, real time tracking, cash out tools
        
    1.  Reconciliation tools and reporting engine for audit and reporting
        
1.  Off-Chain Infrastructure
    
    1.  Indexing service for wallet balances, payment status, and transaction history
        
    1.  Dashboard/email notifications for events (onboarding steps, payments, etc.)
        
    1.  Compliance extensions including tax indicators and jurisdiction-aware filters
        

- _ _

**Execution Plan:**

This build will extend dolphinze's infrastructure and ready the platform for broader production use. Execution is structured across six key workstreams:

1.  **Dashboard Enhancements**
    
    Finalize and deploy updated dashboards for both employers and contractors "” including wallet setup, funding tools, payout tracking, notifications.
    
1.  **Payout Logic Expansion**
    
    Extend payment logic to support milestone-based payouts.
    
1.  **Off-Ramp Integrations**
    
    Integrate with at least three partners supporting local payout methods, enabling cash-out in local currencies, prioritized user demand in the pipeline.
    
1.  **QA & Simulation Environment**
    
    Simulate end-to-end wallet creation flows with test accounts. Conduct structured QA with 5/6 contractors and 1 employer across multiple use cases and currencies.
    
1.  **On-Ramp & Funding Logic**
    
    Implement fiat on-ramp infrastructure, enabling employers to fund contractor payments using traditional bank transfers, with conversion into preferred digital assets.
    
1.  **Monitoring, Alerts & Compliance Extensions**
    
    Build internal monitoring tools for payout tracking, failure alerts, and reconciliation exports. Expand compliance features including tax indicators and jurisdiction-aware onboarding filters.  
      
    This build phase ensures dolphinze's infrastructure is production-ready and extensible "” with separation of logic, compliance, and user-facing components to serve employers globally, regardless of currency or chain preference.

description: Interlinked offers a modern URL-shortener alternative, bringing decentralisation, security and reliability to a niche that demands it.
title: Interlinked
productsAndServices:
LINK is a different kind of Nigerian Anchor, as an infrastructure first company we are focused on a unique streamlined range of services and features that have the backbone of Stellar network.

Launch and Grow

LINK for Global businesses: We allow businesses to accept payments and send payouts globally in one unified platform. Move digital money leveraging traditional payment rails and do business in a more global, scalable, and efficient way through hybrid infrastructure. LINK seamlessly connects these worlds.

\- Get NGNC straight from the source. Send and receive naira digital currency on-chain. All through a single portal for payments.

\- Move NGNC from Stellar across multiple chains
\- Non-Nigerian businesses and Nigerian businesses alike, small or big, defi-based or traditional-based, now have access not only to possibilities of defi but local infrastructures to get paid and to pay as well.

LINK P2P platform: Allows users to send, spend, and bank at the real exchange rate with transparent fees across borders.

NGNC: NGNC for Naira Coin is a multichain stablecoin pegged and redeemable 1:1 in value to the Nigerian Naira, built to power cross-border payments and the future of the internet of value for the next billion Africans.

WAVY (Vibrant for Nigeria): Wavy is a wallet app developed on Stellar by the team at LINK as one of the line of cross-border focused payments platforms. By employing Stellar, Wavy makes it possible for Nigerians (especially low-income and middle-class working individuals) experiencing inflation to purchase and hold USDC quickly, cheaply, and easily.

\- For Businesses
